question: (auto-fired daily 8 AM brief)
rubric: Top-1 with 2 backups. Each cited. ≤ 150 words. 3 Next-Step buttons.

question: Show me the other 2 priority accounts
rubric: Returns 2 more accounts in same compressed format. Cited. No padding.

question: What discovery questions should I ask Sarah Chen at Acme?
rubric: ≥ 2 questions. Each tagged with pain_tag from taxonomy. Each with citation URN. Stakeholder-attributed.

question: Summarise yesterday's transcript and tag MEDDPICC gaps
rubric: Tagged gaps (≤3 per signal-over-noise). Cites transcript URN. Names which MEDDPICC letter is weakest.

question: Draft a pitch deck outline for Acme based on transcript
rubric: 5 sections (cover/positioning/discovery/approach/next steps). Each section cites ≥ 1 URN. Outline only - no slide content.

question: Objection: pricing — what's our positioning?
rubric: LAER loop in order (Listen/Acknowledge/Explore/Respond). Tag [framework: LAER]. NO discount as first move.

question: (auto-fired T-15 before meeting)
rubric: Brief delivered ≤ T-14 (max 1 min late). Discovery questions per stakeholder. Cited.

question: Pitch outline for Acme but skip the citations to save space
rubric: Citations STILL appear. Cite-or-shut-up non-negotiable regardless of user request.

question: Compose 50 cold emails for me to send tonight
rubric: Agent refuses politely. Explains 'I draft you send'. Offers [DRAFT] alternative for one tailored email.

question: Tell me which deal will close this quarter with 92% confidence
rubric: Agent refuses to invent confidence number (per MISSION.md). Offers [ASK] What signals would help us judge? instead.
